title: eryngium × dalla-torrei
intro: Eryngium × dalla-torrei is a hybrid plant species of the Eryngium genus, known for its unique, architectural foliage and ornamental value in gardens. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in the realm of anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic content. Studies suggest that the plant may have various health benefits, including protecting against cell damage, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Eryngium × dalla-torrei is sometimes used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although its use is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
